scripts.test:lua: mkdir -p allure-results && if command -v busted > /dev/null 2>&1; then cd .. && busted --output junit spec/lua/ | sed "s/name='Run [0-9]* of [0-9]*'/name='Lua unit tests'/" > spec/allure-results/TEST-lua-unit.xml; fi
scripts.test: npm run test:lua && npm run test:integration && npm run test:report
